messages.content: Create a Dirac subroutine to list directory contents

<subroutine name="ls"
  description="List directory contents"
  param-path="string:optional:Directory to list (default current directory):/tmp"
  param-all="boolean:optional:Show hidden files"
  param-long="boolean:optional:Use long listing format"
  meta-bash-command="ls">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="ls" />
  <test-if test="$all" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -a</assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$long" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -l</assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$path" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="path" /></assign>
  </test-if>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to display file contents

<subroutine name="cat"
  description="Display file contents"
  param-file="string:required:File to display:file.txt"
  meta-bash-command="cat">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="cat" />
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="file" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to display a message

<subroutine name="echo"
  description="Display a message"
  param-message="string:required:Message to display:Hello World"
  meta-bash-command="echo">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="echo" />
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="message" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to create directory

<subroutine name="mkdir"
  description="Create directory"
  param-path="string:required:Directory path to create:/tmp/newdir"
  param-parents="boolean:optional:Create parent directories as needed"
  meta-bash-command="mkdir">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="mkdir" />
  <test-if test="$parents" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -p</assign>
  </test-if>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="path" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to remove files or directories

<subroutine name="rm"
  description="Remove files or directories"
  param-path="string:required:File or directory to remove:file.txt"
  param-recursive="boolean:optional:Remove directories recursively"
  param-force="boolean:optional:Force removal without confirmation"
  meta-bash-command="rm">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="rm" />
  <test-if test="$recursive" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -r</assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$force" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -f</assign>
  </test-if>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="path" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to copy files or directories

<subroutine name="cp"
  description="Copy files or directories"
  param-source="string:required:Source file or directory:file.txt"
  param-destination="string:required:Destination path:/tmp/file.txt"
  param-recursive="boolean:optional:Copy directories recursively"
  meta-bash-command="cp">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="cp" />
  <test-if test="$recursive" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -r</assign>
  </test-if>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="source" /></assign>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="destination" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to move or rename files

<subroutine name="mv"
  description="Move or rename files"
  param-source="string:required:Source file or directory:old.txt"
  param-destination="string:required:Destination path:new.txt"
  meta-bash-command="mv">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="mv" />
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="source" /></assign>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="destination" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to search for patterns in files

<subroutine name="grep"
  description="Search for patterns in files"
  param-pattern="string:required:Pattern to search for:error"
  param-file="string:required:File to search in:log.txt"
  param-ignorecase="boolean:optional:Case-insensitive search"
  meta-bash-command="grep">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="grep" />
  <test-if test="$ignorecase" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -i</assign>
  </test-if>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="pattern" /></assign>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="file" /></assign>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to transfer data from or to a server

<subroutine name="curl"
  description="Transfer data from or to a server"
  param-url="string:required:URL to request:https://api.example.com"
  param-method="string:optional:HTTP method:GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH:POST"
  param-data="string:optional:Data to send in request body:{"key":"value"}"
  meta-bash-command="curl">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="curl" />
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="url" /></assign>
  <test-if test="$method" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -X <variable name="method" /></assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$data" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -d <variable name="data" /></assign>
  </test-if>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to download files from the web

<subroutine name="wget"
  description="Download files from the web"
  param-url="string:required:URL to download:https://example.com/file.zip"
  param-output="string:optional:Output filename:downloaded.zip"
  meta-bash-command="wget">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="wget" />
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="url" /></assign>
  <test-if test="$output" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -O <variable name="output" /></assign>
  </test-if>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to archive files

<subroutine name="tar"
  description="Archive files"
  param-file="string:required:Archive filename:archive.tar.gz"
  param-create="boolean:optional:Create new archive"
  param-extract="boolean:optional:Extract archive"
  param-compress="boolean:optional:Compress with gzip"
  param-path="string:optional:Files or directories to archive/extract:./src"
  meta-bash-command="tar">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="tar" />
  <test-if test="$create" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -c</assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$extract" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -x</assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$compress" eq="true">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -z</assign>
  </test-if>
  <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -f <variable name="file" /></assign>
  <test-if test="$path" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="path" /></assign>
  </test-if>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
Create a Dirac subroutine to search for files in directory hierarchy

<subroutine name="find"
  description="Search for files in directory hierarchy"
  param-path="string:optional:Starting directory (default current):/tmp"
  param-name="string:optional:Search by filename pattern:*.txt"
  param-type="string:optional:Search by type:f|d|l:f"
  meta-bash-command="find">

  <defvar name="cmd" value="find" />
  <test-if test="$path" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> <variable name="path" /></assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$name" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -name <variable name="name" /></assign>
  </test-if>
  <test-if test="$type" ne="">
    <assign name="cmd"><variable name="cmd" /> -type <variable name="type" /></assign>
  </test-if>

  <system><variable name="cmd" /></system>
</subroutine>
